text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, here I am, to watch the race...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is racing today. Did you hear
that she's aiming for the Classic Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Sure did. But isn't she best at sprinting?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's what I thought too. Her trainer's just
wasting both of their time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: G-go, Bourbon! Y-you can do it!

The murmur of the crowd echoes quietly
throughout the runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Today, at Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, I will
accomplish our objective of changing the public's
perception of me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Get out there and give it everything you've got!
Get out there and give it everything you've got!
